summary: Comprehensive testing of NEXUS Hybrid Services completed. Backend: 24/24 tests passed (100%). Fixed MongoDB collection boolean testing bug in ML and Net Neutrality services. All 14 hybrid systems operational. Frontend: Net Neutrality Dashboard fully functional with Internet Health monitoring, campaign management, and representative lookup.

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB collection boolean testing error - 'Collection objects do not implement truth value testing'
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'if self.collection:' to 'if self.collection is not None:' for all collection checks

bugs_fixed.issue: Same MongoDB collection boolean testing error
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'if self.collection:' to 'if self.collection is not None:' for all collection checks

bugs_fixed.issue: MongoDB ObjectId serialization error - insert_one modifies dict in place adding _id
bugs_fixed.fix: Changed 'insert_one(obj)' to 'insert_one(obj.copy())' to prevent _id from being added to response objects

updated_files: /app/backend/services/nexus_hybrid_ml.py - Fixed MongoDB collection checks and ObjectId serialization
/app/backend/services/nexus_hybrid_netneutrality.py - Fixed MongoDB collection checks and ObjectId serialization
/app/backend/tests/test_hybrid_services_v12.py - Created comprehensive test suite for hybrid services

success_rate.frontend: 100% - All pages load, Net Neutrality Dashboard fully functional

seed_data_creation: Test users created with TEST_ prefix during testing
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 14 hybrid services tested and operational. ML Hybrid supports training jobs, datasets, AutoML, predictions, and marketplace. Net Neutrality Hybrid supports campaigns, petitions, representative lookup, call scripts, and internet health monitoring. Ultimate Controller correctly shows 14 active hybrids. MongoDB is running and all CRUD operations work correctly after fixes.

ui_verification.homepage: Loads correctly with navigation, Quick Access, Trending Now
ui_verification.discovery_hub: MCP Servers and Workflow Tools tabs visible

features_verified: Global Internet Health metrics (Overall Score, Accessibility, Privacy, Censorship, Compliance)
Contact Congress tab with ZIP code lookup
Representative cards with Get Call Script and Send Email buttons

mocked_apis_note: Most hybrid endpoints return mock/demo data. Real integrations: MongoDB, Cloudflare R2. ML training is simulated, Net neutrality campaigns use demo data.
